title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.380 - Violators guilty of crime of abuse of elevator safety, penalty
text:
701.380.  Violators guilty of crime of abuse of elevator safety, penalty. — 1.  Any owner, agent or lessee who willfully violates any of the provisions of sections 701.350 to 701.380 or operates an installation ordered out of service shall be guilty of the crime of abuse of elevator safety.
  2.  Abuse of elevator safety is a class C misdemeanor.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1035 § 10)
